    internal ITestEnum_T_Mock(global::ITestEnum<T> mockObject, global::TUnit.Mocks.MockEngine<global::ITestEnum<T>> engine)
        : base(mockObject, engine) { }

    global::System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerator<T> global::System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable<T>.GetEnumerator() => Object.GetEnumerator();

{
    private readonly global::TUnit.Mocks.MockEngine<global::ITestEnum<T>> _engine;

    [global::System.ComponentModel.EditorBrowsable(global::System.ComponentModel.EditorBrowsableState.Never)]
    global::TUnit.Mocks.IMock? global::TUnit.Mocks.IMockObject.MockWrapper { get; set; }

    internal ITestEnum_T_MockImpl(global::TUnit.Mocks.MockEngine<global::ITestEnum<T>> engine)
    {
        _engine = engine;
    }

    public global::System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerator<T> GetEnumerator()
    {
        return _engine.HandleCallWithReturn<global::System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerator<T>>(0, "GetEnumerator", global::System.Array.Empty<object?>(), default!);
    }

    global::System.Collections.IEnumerator global::System.Collections.IEnumerable.GetEnumerator() => GetEnumerator();

    [global::System.ComponentModel.EditorBrowsable(global::System.ComponentModel.EditorBrowsableState.Never)]
    public void RaiseEvent(string eventName, object? args)
    {
        throw new global::System.InvalidOperationException($"No event named '{eventName}' exists on this mock.");
    }
}

internal static class ITestEnum_T_MockFactory
{
    [global::System.Runtime.CompilerServices.ModuleInitializer]
    internal static void Register()
    {
        global::TUnit.Mocks.MockRegistry.RegisterOpenGenericFactory(
            typeof(global::ITestEnum<>),
            typeof(ITestEnum_T_MockImpl<>),
            typeof(ITestEnum_T_Mock<>));
    }

    internal static global::TUnit.Mocks.Mock<global::ITestEnum<T>> CreateAutoMock<T>(global::TUnit.Mocks.MockBehavior behavior)
    {
        var engine = new global::TUnit.Mocks.MockEngine<global::ITestEnum<T>>(behavior);
        var impl = new ITestEnum_T_MockImpl<T>(engine);
        engine.Raisable = impl;
        var mock = new ITestEnum_T_Mock<T>(impl, engine);
        return mock;
    }

}

            public static global::ITestEnum_T_Mock<T> Mock()

                return (global::ITestEnum_T_Mock<T>)global::ITestEnum_T_MockFactory.CreateAutoMock<T>(global::TUnit.Mocks.Mock.DefaultBehavior);
